title: [Sign Up] Verify that submitting the signup form without an email shows a validation error
customPreconds: User is on the Sign Up page.

customStepsSeparated.content: Enter a website URL and password, leaving the email field empty.
customStepsSeparated.expected: Values should be entered in website and password fields.

customStepsSeparated.content: Check the Terms and Conditions checkbox.
Click "Get Started".
customStepsSeparated.expected: "Email is required" error message should be displayed.

title: [Sign Up] Verify that submitting signup with an already-registered email shows a validation error
customPreconds: User is on the Sign Up page. An existing account is registered with a known email address.

customStepsSeparated.content: Enter the existing account's email address in the email field.
Enter a valid website URL and password.
Check the Terms and Conditions checkbox.
Click "Get Started".
customStepsSeparated.expected: "The email has already been taken." error message should be displayed.

title: [Sign Up] Verify that submitting signup with an invalid email format shows a validation error
customPreconds: User is on the Sign Up page.

customStepsSeparated.content: Enter an invalid email address (e.g., "notanemail") in the email field.
Enter a valid website URL and password.
Check the Terms and Conditions checkbox.
Click "Get Started".
customStepsSeparated.expected: "Valid email required" error message should be displayed.

title: [Sign Up] Verify that submitting signup with an email longer than 190 characters shows a validation error
customPreconds: User is on the Sign Up page.

customStepsSeparated.content: Enter an email address exceeding 190 characters in the email field.
Enter a valid website URL and password.
Check the Terms and Conditions checkbox.
Click "Get Started".
customStepsSeparated.expected: "Your email address exceeds the maximum value of 190 characters" error message should be displayed.

title: [Sign Up] Verify that submitting signup without a website shows a validation error
customPreconds: User is on the Sign Up page.

customStepsSeparated.content: Enter a valid email address and password, leaving the website field empty.
Check the Terms and Conditions checkbox.
Click "Get Started".
customStepsSeparated.expected: "Website is required" error message should be displayed.

title: [Sign Up] Verify that submitting signup with an invalid website URL shows a validation error
customPreconds: User is on the Sign Up page.

customStepsSeparated.content: Enter a valid email address and password.
Enter an invalid website URL (not in "example.com" format) in the website field.
Check the Terms and Conditions checkbox.
Click "Get Started".
customStepsSeparated.expected: "Please enter URL in the format example.com" error message should be displayed.

title: [Sign Up] Verify that submitting signup with a website URL longer than 75 characters shows a validation error
customPreconds: User is on the Sign Up page.

customStepsSeparated.content: Enter a valid email address and password.
Enter a website URL longer than 75 characters in the website field.
Check the Terms and Conditions checkbox.
Click "Get Started".
customStepsSeparated.expected: "URL should be less than 75 characters" error message should be displayed.

title: [Sign Up] Verify that submitting signup without a password shows a validation error
customPreconds: User is on the Sign Up page.

customStepsSeparated.content: Enter a valid email address and website URL, leaving the password field empty.
Check the Terms and Conditions checkbox.
Click "Get Started".
customStepsSeparated.expected: "Password is required" error message should be displayed.

title: [Sign Up] Verify that submitting signup with a password shorter than 8 characters shows a validation error
customPreconds: User is on the Sign Up page.

customStepsSeparated.content: Enter a valid email address and website URL.
Enter a password with fewer than 8 characters in the password field.
Check the Terms and Conditions checkbox.
Click "Get Started".
customStepsSeparated.expected: "Minimum 8 characters required" error message should be displayed below the password field.

title: [Sign Up] Verify that submitting signup with a password longer than 64 characters shows a validation error
customPreconds: User is on the Sign Up page.

customStepsSeparated.content: Enter a valid email address and website URL.
Enter a password longer than 64 characters in the password field.
Check the Terms and Conditions checkbox.
Click "Get Started".
customStepsSeparated.expected: "The password is too long" error message should be displayed.

title: [Sign Up] Verify that submitting signup without accepting Terms and Conditions shows a validation error
customPreconds: User is on the Sign Up page.

customStepsSeparated.content: Enter a valid email address, website URL, and password.
Leave the Terms and Conditions checkbox unchecked.
Click "Get Started".
customStepsSeparated.expected: "Please agree to terms and conditions to proceed" error message should be displayed.

title: [Sign Up] Verify that the "Terms and Conditions" link opens the CookieYes Terms and Conditions page
customPreconds: User is on the Sign Up page.

customStepsSeparated.content: Click the "Terms and Conditions" link in the acceptance checkbox label.
customStepsSeparated.expected: The CookieYes Terms and Conditions page should be displayed.

title: [Sign Up] Verify that the "Privacy Policy" link opens the CookieYes Privacy Policy page
customPreconds: User is on the Sign Up page.

customStepsSeparated.content: Click the "Privacy Policy" link in the acceptance checkbox label.
customStepsSeparated.expected: The CookieYes Privacy Policy page should be displayed.

title: [Sign Up] Verify that clicking "Verify Email" in the signup confirmation email opens the email verification success page
customPreconds: User has completed signup with a new email address. The inbox contains a "Verify your email for CookieYes" email.

customStepsSeparated.content: Open the "Verify your email for CookieYes" email in the inbox.
customStepsSeparated.expected: Verification email should be present and opened.

customStepsSeparated.content: Click the "Verify Email" button in the email.
customStepsSeparated.expected: The email verification success page should be displayed.

title: [Sign Up] Verify that clicking "Go to Dashboard" after email verification navigates to the Dashboard
customPreconds: User has clicked "Verify Email" and is on the email verification success page.

customStepsSeparated.content: Click "Go to Dashboard".

title: [Sign Up] Verify that clicking an expired verification email link shows a failure page with a resend option
customPreconds: User has signed up but has not verified their email within 1 hour. The original "Verify your email for CookieYes" email is still in the inbox.

customStepsSeparated.content: Open the "Verify your email for CookieYes" email (more than 1 hour after signup).
customStepsSeparated.expected: Email should be accessible in the inbox.

customStepsSeparated.content: Click "Verify Email".
customStepsSeparated.expected: "Your email verification failed!" page should be displayed.

customStepsSeparated.content: Click "Resend Verification Email".
customStepsSeparated.expected: A new verification email should be received and a "Verification email has been resent successfully." notification should appear.

title: [Sign Up] Verify that clicking a verification link after account deletion shows a failure page
customPreconds: User completed signup but deleted their account before verifying email. The original "Verify your email for CookieYes" email is still in the inbox.

customStepsSeparated.content: Open the "Verify your email for CookieYes" email from the inbox.
Click "Verify Email".
customStepsSeparated.expected: "Your email verification failed!" page should be displayed with a "Resend Verification Email" button.

customStepsSeparated.content: Click "Resend Verification Email".
customStepsSeparated.expected: A new verification email should be received and a success notification should appear. [Note: source cases C70 and C1148 differ on this expected result — verify manually before automation.]
